seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Berowra Heights and Berowra Waters. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Berowra Heights vs Berowra Waters: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Berowra Heights and Berowra Waters.
heading: Berowra Heights vs Berowra Waters — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Berowra Heights, New South Wales and Berowra Waters, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Berowra Heights has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Berowra Waters (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Berowra Heights or Berowra Waters safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Berowra Heights has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Berowra Waters scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Berowra Heights scores 23/100 for bushfire risk. Berowra Waters scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Berowra Heights or Berowra Waters?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Berowra Heights has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.22% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
